title: Tastes Like Vanilla+
description: Tastes Like Vanilla+ is a light modpack designed to enhance the vanilla gameplay experience, without requiring server-side mods.
body:
![Tastes Like Vanilla+ Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5f31eb932b238f9675fc0f2452e461b942764f45.jpeg)

Minecraft is a beautiful game which has stood the test of time throughout it's long life. Rather than fully **reimagine** the game, _Tastes Like Vanilla+_ aims to **enhance** the base game. Rediscover the magical feelings we all hold so dearly of our first times on Minecraft.

The core themes of the pack are **exploration**, **rediscovery**, and **advancement**. The pack is "designed" to challenge players with various difficulty increases, encouraging cautious exploration, to enable building with countless additions to decorative blocks, and to incentivize long-term "grinding" with the technological based mods and added achievements to give players a reason to play beyond the "two week" phase.

The pack isn't perfect, but if you want to enjoy Minecraft beyond the first two weeks, it'll help allow you. Just remember -- Minecraft isn't competitive. The "best" does not matter. Your goal isn't to reach the destination: it's to enjoy the journey.
